chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1997 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 8110/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.04.2019. None is in attendance on behalf of the petitioners. It appears that petitioners have presented the memo of petition in office on 15.05.2018 and the matter remained unattended in office for about one year and was listed before the Court on 20.02.2019, when none was found in attendance on behalf of the petitioners. Today, the position is same as neither the petitioners nor their counsel are in attendance. Such apathy and negligence on the part of petitioners as well their counsel show that either the purpose for which instant petition was filed has been served or they have lost interest in the proceedings therefore, instead to pursue their case vigilantly they have chosen to remain absent. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed in default alongwith all pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail/PA
